title: Advanced Compounds & Alloys
description: AC&A is a very large mod mainly based around science. It is MOSTLY scientifically accurate, but of course not completely, some things are simplified for gameplay (though not massively) and some things I have not been able to find good sources.

-> If ya can't read the images/see em(also extra info), we're providing all of it below <-

# AC&A
AC&A is a mod that adds primarily chemistry, but also a lot of other things.
Like cooking, QOL, bosses, dimensions, building blocks, etc..
It's made by me! (San/Tiktakalex/Snan), my friend InotPCW, and my 3d modeler Keluzafish.

## COOL BUILDING BLOCKS!
AC&A adds a lot of new building blocks!
Though fair warning! I am not good at pixel art and anything visually pleasing is just luck.

## INSANE CHEMISTRY!
AC&A adds tons of realistic chemistry (it is mostly accurate real life chemistry, but i will not claim it to be 100% (as that would be stupid) accurate, but mostly, again, mostly accurate, but theres a limit), from extracting simple materials to making supercomputers and beyond!

## SILLY STUFF!
DINO NUGGIES!! (and other small things tahat you'll have to find yourself)

## MAGIC!
AC&A also adds magic and alchemy! I mean, what did you think? I was gonna contain myself to one subject? Stupendous.

## COOKING!
AC&A adds lots of food like fried eggs, goulasch, hotdogs, and other stuff too!

## AWESOME MACHINES!
AC&A adds a lot of single (and multi) block machines, that serve all sorts of purposes, both QOL and progression in the mod!! THOUGH, i still need to add blueprints for some of the multiblocks.

## {ABOUT REALISM}
So, i tried to make this as scientifically accurate as possible. I have researched real life reactions. But there are obviously limits, gameplay simplifications or misunderstandings that would keep it from being 100% accurate.

## -> PEOPLE THAT WORKED ON THE MOD <-

### San (Snan)
Main dev - Made like literally 99% of the mod.

### Phil (InotPCW)
He helps sometimes, made a few textures (like shineberries) and is a pro painter! (Made some paintings) uhhh, and does stuff.. Marketing.

### Keluzafish
Makes like 99% of our 3d models, with the honourable exeption of the dimensionator (san)
He also (for some reason) have no modrinth account.
